title: Terms of Use
warningBox: YesBoth is a communication tool, not a legal contract. Generated messages have no legally binding value. Each party remains fully responsible for their actions. Strictly reserved for adults (18 years and older).

sections.title: Article 1 — Publisher and Developer Identification
sections.content:
The YesBoth application is published by the French non-profit association Herrichain (loi 1901) (hereinafter "the Publisher") and developed by Artean Digital (www.arteandigital.fr, hereinafter "the Developer").

The Application is hosted on Netlify Inc. infrastructure (512 2nd Street, San Francisco, CA 94107, USA) as a static deployment collecting no user data server-side.

sections.title: Article 2 — Acceptance of Terms
sections.content:
Access to and use of the Application is subject to unconditional acceptance of these Terms of Use (hereinafter "ToU").

Any use of the Application constitutes express, full and unreserved acceptance of these ToU as in force at the time of use.

Any user who does not accept these ToU must refrain from using the Application.

The Publisher reserves the right to modify these ToU at any time without notice.

sections.title: Article 3 — Nature and Purpose of the Application
Article 4 — Access Conditions and Age Requirement
sections.content:
The Application is strictly reserved for persons of legal age under the legislation applicable in their country of residence.

By accessing the Application, the user certifies under oath that they are of legal age. Any false declaration solely engages the user's liability.

The Publisher is technically unable to verify users' age and disclaims any liability in the event of false declarations.

sections.title: Article 5 — No Legally Binding Value
Article 6 — Limitation of Liability
Article 7 — Personal Data and Cookies
sections.content:
7.1 — No data collection
The Application collects, processes, stores, or transmits NO personal data within the meaning of GDPR (EU Regulation 2016/679).

7.2 — Strictly functional local storage
• "yesboth_locale" (localStorage): stores language preference. Retained until deleted by user.
• "yesboth_disclaimer" (sessionStorage): stores disclaimer acknowledgment. Cleared on browser close.
• "yesboth_cookies" (localStorage): stores cookie policy acceptance. Retained until deleted by user.

7.3 — Zero third-party cookies
No tracking cookies, analytics, advertising networks, or behavioral tracking are integrated.

7.4 — User rights
As no personal data is held by the Publisher, GDPR rights (access, rectification, erasure) are exercised directly on the user's own device.

sections.title: Article 8 — Intellectual Property
sections.content:
The entire YesBoth Application is protected by intellectual property law.

The Application is NOT free or open-source software.

Any reproduction, modification, distribution, or commercial use without prior written authorization from the Publisher is strictly prohibited and constitutes infringement subject to civil and criminal penalties.

ALL COMMERCIAL USE IS STRICTLY AND ABSOLUTELY PROHIBITED.

sections.title: Article 9 — Prohibited Conduct
Article 10 — Governing Law and Jurisdiction
sections.content:
These ToU are governed exclusively by French law.

In the event of a dispute, the parties shall seek an amicable resolution within thirty (30) days of notification. Absent agreement, French courts shall have sole jurisdiction.

Users residing in the European Union benefit from the protective provisions of their national law where more favorable.

---
